title: schisandraceae
intro: The schisandraceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a clade of flowering plant families that together form a distinct group based on shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Schisandraceae is a small but unique family of plants known for their aromatic, star-shaped flowers and often woody or climbing habits. This family includes several genera, such as Schisandra and Kadsura, which are commonly found in Asia and are valued for their medicinal and ornamental properties. The schisandraceae family is part of the broader group of flowering plants, and its unique characteristics set it apart from other plant families.
